title: LLMs.txt
description: This template generates AI-facing text exports from the docs corpus.
content: # LLMs.txt This template generates AI-facing text exports from the docs corpus. ## Generated Files - `/llms.txt` - `/llms-full.txt` ## Why They Exist These files give AI tools and internal agents a clean text entry point without requiring them to crawl the full UI. ## How They Are Generated `npm run build` runs `scripts/generate-llms.mjs` automatically. If you only want to refresh AI exports while writing, run: ```bash npm run generate:llms ``` ## When To Regenerate Regenerate after: - changing Markdown content - renaming or restructuring docs sections - updating docs metadata that should appear in exported summaries ## Helpful Links Download llms.txt Download llms-full.txt Copy llms.txt URL ## Preview {llms-preview}
